Order Now

Welcome to CheapFood.io

Save, Fast, Reliable, and full of savings!

How to Order Order Now

What We Offer 🔥

We offer DoorDash and UberEats at 50% off for both delivery and pickup!

Fast delivery from your favorite restaurants! 🔥

Quick pickup or delivery, your choice! 🔥

How to Order

Website Orders

How to Order (Super Easy! 🍔):

  • Click “Order Now” or go to order.cheapfood.io.
  • Sign in with your Telegram account.
  • Tap “Status” at the bottom, pick a service.
  • Fill in your order details.
  • Connect with a Chef.
  • Pay with CashApp, Venmo, or Zelle—your Chef will handle it! 💸
  • Done! Your food’s on the way, and you saved big! 🙌
  • Need help? Contact @cheapfoodsupport. 🚀

How to Order via Telegram

Sign in with your Telegram account:

  • Go to @CheapFoods_bot.
  • Type /start to kick things off!
  • Pick your favorite service from the options.
  • Fill out the quick order form.
  • Connect with one of our awesome Chefs.
  • Pay your Chef with CashApp, Venmo, or Zelle—they’ll whip it up fast! 💸
  • Done! Your food’s on the way, and you saved big! 🙌
  • Need help? Contact @cheapfoodsupport. 🚀

Follow Us on X

@cheapfoodb4u

Use code X-CheapFoodb4u to get fully reimbursed for your meal after you vouch with a picture of your food that has a handwritten @Cheapfood.io fan sign! 🎉
